title: Define Meshtastic metadata/module/region placeholder policy
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.6 emits synthetic DeviceMetadata, disabled telemetry ModuleConfig, and a minimal US/LongFast region preset map, but exact target app requirements for min_app_version, excluded_modules, module records, and region constraints are not settled. What needs to be done: verify current Android/iOS/Python behavior against pinned protobufs, define min_app_version and excluded_modules bit policy, decide whether region presets must cover all target regions, and update tests/vectors/docs. Acceptance criteria: synthetic metadata does not misrepresent LICHEN as Meshtastic RF firmware; module/region placeholders are explicitly documented and app-smoke-testable.
notes:
Implemented placeholder policy for Meshtastic compatibility MVP. Source evidence checked against current heads: meshtastic/protobufs 9cb134be322dd7122e80d49b17dad9a213ff752e (LoRaRegionPresetMap absence tolerated; ExcludedModules bits through NETWORK_CONFIG=0x4000; ModuleConfig variants through mesh_beacon=17), meshtastic/firmware e64d20548c4313c92e0e641c41d388828e1d024a (PhoneAPI sends metadata, region presets, channels, config, implemented module config cases), Meshtastic-Android 60119ce9d2e4efcb2e81336dbde29c1b70c9f293 (min_app_version only gates app-update prompt; region_presets handled when present; module configs persisted independently), Meshtastic-Apple aeeb0cc49fbe0ed593e918ba2f95100ecf694256 and meshtastic/python 6d76edf8a7b192c51e3a5d26bc5868da556ac3d9 (no newer head than pinned baseline during this check).
Policy/result: docs now require LICHEN-branded synthetic metadata, PRIVATE_HW, min_app_version 30200, excluded_modules 0x5fff when Meshtastic BLE active and 0x7fff when absent, no fabricated board-specific Meshtastic RF firmware identity, one disabled telemetry ModuleConfig placeholder, and one US/LONG_FAST region_presets map. Smoke-test scripts distinguish metadata exclusion bits from module/admin absence or disabled behavior.
Tests/vectors added: meshtastic_app_compat canonical vectors now include module_config_disabled_telemetry encoded as FromRadio field 9 payload 3206080010007000, and region_presets_us_long_fast encoded as FromRadio field 19 payload 0a0408001000120408011000. schema.json and python/tests/test_vectors.py validate payload presence, FromRadio fields, and decoded telemetry/region semantics. Zephyr generated-vector harness includes moduleConfig/region_presets vector kinds; meshtastic_codec native_sim also asserts exact generated placeholder fields and rejects invalid protobuf field 0 in the field-count helper.
Review evidence: initial reviews found placeholder tests did not assert exclusivity, firmware doc wording overstated module cases, payload_count_fields accepted illegal protobuf field 0, docs conflicted on LONG_MODERATE vs LONG_FAST, smoke-test wording overstated excluded_modules coverage, app-compat vectors lacked placeholder bytes, Markdown continuation had tabs, and Python vector tests did not semantically decode new payloads. All P2/medium/low findings were fixed. Final independent reviews by Turing the 3rd and Arendt the 3rd found no remaining correctness issues.
Validation evidence: local git diff --check passed. Local PYTHONPATH=python/src .venv/bin/python -m pytest python/tests/test_vectors.py -q passed 81/81. EC2 builder i-05e27e074db786e22 clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate direct command west build -b native_sim lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -d build/meshtastic_codec-t2hn65-final4 --pristine -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate/lichen && west build -d build/meshtastic_codec-t2hn65-final4 -t run passed meshtastic_codec 23/23. EC2 Twister command west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/app_interface -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-t2hn65-final3 --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate/lichen passed 5/5 configurations, 113 cases, 0 failed, 0 skipped, 0 warnings.
close_reason: Defined and tested Meshtastic placeholder policy: LICHEN-branded PRIVATE_HW metadata, min_app_version/excluded_modules policy, disabled telemetry ModuleConfig, US/LONG_FAST region presets, app smoke-test criteria, canonical vectors, schema/Python semantic checks, and Zephyr native_sim coverage. Local vector tests passed 81/81; EC2 native_sim codec passed 23/23; EC2 Twister Meshtastic set passed 5/5 configs, 113 cases, 0 warnings. Final independent reviews clean.
